note: Display-only metadata for persona pool templates. Source of truth for frontend + backend. Filter specs live in backend/src/data/pool_templates.py.

pools.description: Graduate engineers, analysts, and senior professionals in metros. High disposable income, high digital literacy.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Products targeting affluent urban professionals — premium fintech, wealth management, direct-equity platforms, B2B SaaS, premium health / lifestyle subscriptions.

pools.description: Salaried workers in metros across multiple sectors. Middle-to-upper-middle income. Broader than the tech-affluent template.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Mass-premium consumer products — food delivery, fitness, upskilling, insurance, broader fintech (UPI apps, BNPL).

pools.description: Early-career workers (18–30) in tier-2 Indian cities. Graduate or senior-secondary education. Digital-native, price-conscious, aspirational.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Micro-savings, BNPL, credit-building, entry-level investing, upskilling platforms, vernacular social apps.

pools.description: Small business owners, skilled tradespeople, shopkeepers, and mid-career salaried workers in tier-2/3 cities.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: SMB tools, bookkeeping, vernacular commerce, micro-lending, supply-chain fintech, utility payments.

pools.description: Low-to-middle-income households in small cities and rural India. Informal economy workers, farmers, domestic workers, transport operators.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Micro-savings, gold savings, rural fintech, agri-tech, vernacular utility apps, remittance, insurance.

pools.description: Drivers, delivery workers, skilled trades, and manual-labor workforce in tier-1/2 cities.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Gig-worker fintech, earned-wage access, commuter-focused apps, tool-rental, skill-credentialing.

pools.description: Women 25–55 in tier-1/2 cities, primary household decision-makers. Typically married, managing groceries, children's education, family health.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Grocery delivery, kids' education apps, family health insurance, homemaker social commerce, telemedicine.

pools.description: Graduate seniors (55+) in metros with retirement savings. Health-conscious, increasingly digital.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Senior-care tech, health insurance, telemedicine, estate planning, vernacular social, hobbyist apps.

pools.description: Cultivators, farm laborers, farm overseers, and agri-adjacent workers in rural India.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Agri-tech, crop advisory, input marketplaces, farm-credit, rural insurance, FPO-tech.

pools.description: Teachers, trainers, and government administrative workers in smaller Indian cities. Stable income, high credibility within community.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Edtech for teachers, govt-scheme portals, pension/retirement products, stable-income credit products.

pools.description: Self-employed business owners, traders, dealers, and entrepreneurs in tier-1/2 cities. Revenue-generating.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: B2B SaaS, payment gateways, working-capital loans, GST/accounting tools, e-commerce enablement.

pools.description: Graduate / senior-secondary urban young adults in metros and tier-2. First-time users of credit, payments, and investment products.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: First-job fintech, student loans, UPI onboarding, early-career credit cards, entry-level investing, online learning.

pools.description: Unmarried urban young adults 22–32, metros and tier-2. Active social / dating app demographic.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Dating apps, modern social products, lifestyle subscriptions, mental-health apps, travel / experience products targeting solo users.

pools.description: Married urban adults 30–50 across tier-1/2 cities, any gender, any occupation. Primary family financial + product decision-makers.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Family health insurance, life insurance, kids' edtech, home loans, family-plan subscriptions, tax-saving products, retirement planning.

pools.description: Bachelor's-or-higher tech, finance, and consulting professionals in major metros (SF, NYC, Seattle, Boston, LA, Austin). 25–40, upper-middle to affluent.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Premium fintech, wealth management, direct-equity platforms, B2B / vertical SaaS, premium health subscriptions, prosumer creator tools.

pools.description: College-educated salaried millennials (28–43) in metros across multiple sectors. Middle-to-upper-middle income. Broader than the tech-affluent template.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Mass-premium consumer — food delivery, fitness, telehealth, broader fintech (Chime, Affirm, Cash App), upskilling, mid-tier insurance.

pools.description: Urban + suburban Americans 18–27, students or early career. High social-platform native, price-conscious, identity-aware.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Social, BNPL, creator economy, mental health, dating, learning, early-credit, sustainable / mission-led brands.

pools.description: Married millennials 30–45 in suburban America with kids. Mid-to-upper-middle income, mortgage-paying, family-budget-driven.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Family insurance, home services, kids' edtech, grocery delivery, telehealth, mortgage refi, college savings.

pools.description: Married Gen X (44–59) in urban / suburban America. Primary financial decision-makers. Established income, peak earning years.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Mortgage refi, life insurance, college 529, retirement planning, home services, healthcare, premium financial products.

pools.description: Americans 60–80 in urban / suburban / small-city settings. Retirement-stage; many still actively managing investments and healthcare.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Medicare Advantage, telehealth, estate planning, hearing aids, senior-care, group travel, premium hobby & wellness subscriptions.

pools.description: Working- and middle-class adults 25–55 in small US cities (10K–250K population). Broad mix of skilled-trade, healthcare, education, and retail occupations.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Walmart-tier ecommerce, regional banking, home improvement, community credit-union products, mid-tier insurance, family commerce.

pools.description: Rural Americans 25–65 in agriculture, skilled trades, manual labor, transport, and rural retail. Lower-middle income, traditional values.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Rural fintech, agri-tech, regional insurance, Tractor Supply / Cabela's-tier ecommerce, rural telehealth, hunting / outdoor brands.

pools.description: Drivers, delivery workers, skilled trades, retail and hospitality staff in metros 22–50. Low-to-middle income, variable / hourly pay.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Earned-wage access, gig fintech, trade-tools software, banking-the-underbanked, prepaid cards, financial-wellness apps.

pools.description: Married, primarily female, 28–50, urban / suburban America. Stay-at-home or out-of-workforce caregivers managing household decisions.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Family commerce, kids' learning, telehealth, social commerce, parenting subscriptions, household financial products.

pools.description: American 18–24-year-olds in college or early jobs. Some-college / bachelors-in-progress, low income, first-time financial product users.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Student loans / refi, first-job fintech, early credit cards, banking-for-students, social, dating, learning subscriptions.

pools.description: American 30–60 small-business owners and solopreneurs in urban, suburban, and small-city markets. Revenue-generating, decision-makers for tooling spend.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: B2B SaaS, payment processors, accounting & payroll, marketing platforms, working-capital lenders, e-commerce enablement.

pools.description: Creators, designers, writers, and freelancers 25–45 in major US metros. Variable income, identity tied to craft, heavy creator-economy usage.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Creator economy tools (Stripe, Substack, Patreon), payment apps, mental health, lifestyle / learning subscriptions, prosumer SaaS.

pools.description: Never-married urban Americans 22–35. Major metros, dating-app demographic, lifestyle-focused.
pools.ideal_customer_profile: Dating apps, modern social products, lifestyle subscriptions, mental health, solo travel, premium consumer subscriptions.
